title: cross_engine integration audit — meta_engine + roadmap_engine + cross_engine → hexa_sim atlas bridge
trigger: 30+ cross-engine witnesses (12 meta_engine + 8 roadmap_engine + 7 cross_engine ω-cycles + 11 dossiers + 5 spec files + 2 working tools + 5 r4 fixtures) accumulated 2026-04-25/26 with zero atlas anchor + zero falsifier coverage; hexa_sim atlas (21850 lines, 8 append shards) treats these deliverables as nonexistent

axes.name: inventory
axes.result: scanned design/{meta_engine,roadmap_engine,cross_engine}/, spec/, tool/m5_ordinal.py + r4_replan.py + r4_bench/. Counted: 12 meta_engine ω-cycles + 4 dossiers, 8 roadmap_engine ω-cycles + 4 dossiers + 5 fixtures + MANIFEST, 4 cross_engine ω-cycles + 3 dossiers. Total ≈ 30+ witnesses + 5 specs + 2 tools.

axes.name: load_bearing_identification
axes.result: 8 SHA-stable artifacts (4 spec + 1 tool-pair + MANIFEST + 3 dossiers) + 2 deterministic test commands (m5_ordinal_test.py / r4_replan_test.py both PASS, byte-identical output across 2 runs)

axes.name: proposal
axes.result: 7 atlas entries (3 @T + 4 @M) into NEW shard atlas.append.cross-engine-meta-roadmap-2026-04-26.n6 + 7 falsifiers F126-F132 (4 SHA-anchored + 2 tool-test + 1 meta-axis grep)

axes.name: test_idempotency
axes.result: all 7 cmds re-run 2x with byte-identical output. SHA cmds deterministic by shasum construction; tool-tests print fixed sentinels (__M5_ORDINAL__ PASS corpus=50 fuzzer=10 / __R4_REPLAN__ PASS geo_mean=0.707 worst_case=0.893 matches=5/5); grep cmd trivially deterministic. Idempotency_score=7/7.

axes.name: shard_proposal
axes.result: NEW shard atlas.append.cross-engine-meta-roadmap-2026-04-26.n6 — disjoint from 8 existing shards (verified no slug collision on m3_anchor / m5_ordinal / r4_replan / r10_m10), header analog to nexus-historical-absorption shard

falsifier.cmd_sketch: cd nexus && python3 tool/m5_ordinal_test.py 2>&1 | grep -q '__M5_ORDINAL__ PASS corpus=50 fuzzer=10' && echo M5_ORDINAL_PARSER_PASS
cd nexus && python3 tool/r4_replan_test.py 2>&1 | grep -q '__R4_REPLAN__ PASS geo_mean=0.707 worst_case=0.893 matches=5/5' && echo R4_REPLAN_GEO_MEAN_INTACT
